title: Prepare and monitor budgets and financial reports
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and monitor budgets and financial reports demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare a budget

pcs.text: Obtain information on past receipts and payments and compare to current prices and cost trends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain information on past receipts and payments and compare to current prices and cost trends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain information on past receipts and payments and compare to current prices and cost trends.

pcs.text: Prepare gross margin projections for each production enterprise of the business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare gross margin projections for each production enterprise of the business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare gross margin projections for each production enterprise of the business.

pcs.text: Identify projected non-enterprise income and overhead costs for the business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify projected non-enterprise income and overhead costs for the business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify projected non-enterprise income and overhead costs for the business.

pcs.text: Identify projected capital-based income and costs for the business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify projected capital-based income and costs for the business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify projected capital-based income and costs for the business.

pcs.text: Prepare a plan for a period which allows for expected income and expenditure, using the 'most likely' prices and costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a plan for a period which allows for expected income and expenditure, using the 'most likely' prices and costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a plan for a period which allows for expected income and expenditure, using the 'most likely' prices and costs.

pcs.text: Ensure the plan allows the business to meet financial reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure the plan allows the business to meet financial reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the plan allows the business to meet financial reporting requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare a budget

elements.title: Implement and monitor a budget

pcs.text: Monitor receipts and payments and reconcile against the original budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor receipts and payments and reconcile against the original budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor receipts and payments and reconcile against the original budget.

pcs.text: Allocate funds in accordance with budget objectives and parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate funds in accordance with budget objectives and parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate funds in accordance with budget objectives and parameters.

pcs.text: Identify variances against the original plan and calculate the impact on overall profit and loss and cash flow
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify variances against the original plan and calculate the impact on overall profit and loss and cash flow?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify variances against the original plan and calculate the impact on overall profit and loss and cash flow.

pcs.text: Make adjustments to the original plan for the remainder of the budget period where necessary to respond to unacceptable variations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make adjustments to the original plan for the remainder of the budget period where necessary to respond to unacceptable variations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make adjustments to the original plan for the remainder of the budget period where necessary to respond to unacceptable variations.

pcs.text: Renegotiate and restructure budgets and plans to optimise enterprise performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Renegotiate and restructure budgets and plans to optimise enterprise performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Renegotiate and restructure budgets and plans to optimise enterprise performance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement and monitor a budget

elements.title: Prepare financial report

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of financial performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of financial performance.

pcs.text: Assemble information with source documents according to the requirements of the report recipient
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble information with source documents according to the requirements of the report recipient?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble information with source documents according to the requirements of the report recipient.

pcs.text: Prepare financial reports to meet both management and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare financial reports to meet both management and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare financial reports to meet both management and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Forward documentation to management in a timely and efficient manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Forward documentation to management in a timely and efficient manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Forward documentation to management in a timely and efficient manner.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare financial report

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
